ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing AI risk management systems, including establishing governance frameworks aligned to organizational risk tolerance, defining roles and responsibilities, and creating decision structures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-001 (AG, Skill) maps to Market Research Analyst scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5348 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.535, eu_ai_act=0.524, ddat=0.427. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AG-S-001 with composite 0.5348 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5348 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AG domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AG domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5348 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-S-001 (composite 0.5348) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5348 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.5348 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5348, domain AG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
